items.promptRawJa: Lorsque le véhicule croise un véhicule à sens inverse sur la route dangereuse, il faut______.
items.promptGlossEn: When your vehicle encounters an oncoming vehicle on a dangerous road, you should______.
optionsRawJa: A Ne pas réduire la vitesse.
D Diminuer la vitesse ou s'arrêter et privilégier l'autre véhicule.
optionsGlossEn: Reduce speed or stop and give way to the other vehicle.
items.correctAnswerRaw: Diminuer la vitesse ou s'arrêter et privilégier l'autre véhicule.
items.reviewerNotes: Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Prompt and options match q0123: on narrow/dangerous roads you should reduce speed or stop and yield. Source option D corresponds to the same instruction.

items.promptRawJa: Si un véhicule hors d'usage subit une réparation complète, il peut être utilisé.
items.promptGlossEn: If an end-of-life vehicle undergoes a complete repair, can it be used?
items.reviewerNotes: Codex medium-risk createNewQuestion: Question about whether an end-of-life vehicle, after full repair, may be used is a regulatory/legal item not matched by top candidates. The likely correct answer is 'No' (French option B), but existing qids don't represent this exact rule — create new localized question and human-verify.

items.promptRawJa: Le véhicule considéré comme inutilisable selon la réglementation nationale ne peut être enregistré.
items.promptGlossEn: A vehicle considered unusable under national regulations cannot be registered.
items.reviewerNotes: Codex medium-risk createNewQuestion: Statement that a vehicle deemed unusable under national regulation cannot be registered is a specific legal assertion not covered by candidate items. Recommend creating a new question; source answer appears to be Yes (French option A).

items.promptRawJa: Que faut-il faire si le véhicule non motorisé presse le passage dans la circulation ?
items.promptGlossEn: What should you do if a non-motorized vehicle is trying to pass through traffic?
optionsGlossEn: C: Slow down and let pass
items.reviewerNotes: Codex ultra-strict approveExistingQid: MCQ option rows align; French key C (Slow down and let pass) maps to master C (reduce speed and yield). Prompt and option-row concepts were checked against qbank; answer key follows French order.

items.promptRawJa: Qu'indique le panneau ?
items.promptGlossEn: What does the sign indicate?
optionsRawJa: A lieu et distance restante à parcourir
C avertissement de division de circulation
optionsGlossEn: A Place and remaining distance to travel
items.correctAnswerRaw: lieu et distance restante à parcourir
items.reviewerNotes: Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Hard-locked qid q0758 is already present in French production/merged history (translations.fr.json). Do not reuse for this source item without manual duplicate review; previous approved match is withheld for QC.

items.promptRawJa: En cas d'accident ayant causé des dommages matériels, l'agent de police n'est pas en droit d'interpeller les conducteurs restés sur les lieux de l'accident qui auraient du être évacués.
items.promptGlossEn: In the event of an accident causing property damage, the police officer does not have the right to question drivers who remained at the scene of the accident but should have been evacuated.
items.reviewerNotes: Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Legal nuance unclear: candidates disagree whether police may order drivers to leave/evacuate after property-damage collisions. Insufficient evidence to map to an existing qid or to choose True/False. Rejected top matcher: Top candidate (q0250) asserts police cannot order leave; conflicting candidates and legal nuance make automatic acceptance unsafe.

items.promptRawJa: Quand le conducteur doit-il faire une demande de renouvellement du permis de conduire ?
items.promptGlossEn: When must the driver apply for renewal of their driving license?
optionsRawJa: A une fois sa date de validité arrivée à terme
B une fois la période d'accumulation des points-fautes arrivée à terme
C une fois la période d'accumulation des points-fautes arrivée à terme avec moins de 11 points-fautes accumulés
D une fois la période d'accumulation des points-fautes arrivée à terme avec plus de 11 points-fautes accumulés.
optionsGlossEn: A once its validity date has expired
B once the period for accumulating penalty points has ended
C once the period for accumulating penalty points has ended with less than 11 points accumulated
D once the period for accumulating penalty points has ended with more than 11 points accumulated
items.reviewerNotes: Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Potential new question but local answer key is unknown; kept unresolved for human review. Rejected top matcher: Potential new question but local answer key is unknown; kept unresolved for human review.

items.promptRawJa: Que faut-il faire s'il y a de l'eau accumulée sur la voie ?
items.promptGlossEn: What should you do if there is accumulated water on the road?
optionsGlossEn: A slow down and pass slowly
items.reviewerNotes: Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Hard-locked qid q0117 is already present in French production/merged history (translations.fr.json). Do not reuse for this source item without manual duplicate review; previous approved match is withheld for QC.

items.promptRawJa: Comment faire lorsque le véhicule précédent attend le feu vert pour tourner à droite ?
items.promptGlossEn: What should you do when the vehicle in front is waiting for the green light to turn right?
optionsRawJa: B prendre le tournant par la droite
C klaxonner pour que le véhicule précédent nous cède le passage
optionsGlossEn: take the turn by the right
honk so that the vehicle in front lets us pass
items.reviewerNotes: Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Hard-locked qid q0118 is already present in French production/merged history (translations.fr.json). Do not reuse for this source item without manual duplicate review; previous approved match is withheld for QC.

items.promptRawJa: L'allumage du clignotant d'alerte de danger peut-il etre utilise dans les circonstances suivantes ?
items.promptGlossEn: Can the activation of the hazard warning lights be used in the following situations?
optionsRawJa: C s'arrêter à cause de panne
D diriger la direction pour les véhicules suivants
optionsGlossEn: C stop due to a breakdown
D guide the direction for following vehicles
items.reviewerNotes: Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Prompt asks when hazard warning lights may be used. Options include 'traffic jam' and 'follow preceding vehicles' which are ambiguous across jurisdictions; no clear matching qid in candidates. Keep unresolved until legal/local guideline confirmed (likely only for breakdown/emergency).

items.promptRawJa: Si le véhicule d'en face est installé sur notre voie, que faut-il faire ?
items.promptGlossEn: If the oncoming vehicle is in our lane, what should you do?
optionsRawJa: A se déporter vers le milieu de la voie pour circuler
C lui faire un appel de phare
D le forcer à reculer sur le coté droit
optionsGlossEn: move toward the middle of the road to drive
force them to reverse to the right
items.reviewerNotes: Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Potential match q0120 is now hard-locked in French production/merged history (translations.fr.json; batches 001-016 merged). Source/candidate evidence is not strong enough for duplicate override; kept unresolved for manual QC.

items.promptRawJa: Quelle est la signification du marquage au sol ?
items.promptGlossEn: What is the meaning of the road marking?
optionsRawJa: A interdit de tourner à gauche
C interdit de tourner à droite
optionsGlossEn: B forbidden to make a U-turn
items.reviewerNotes: Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Road marking photo is ambiguous (multiple painted arrows, one crossed). Candidates disagree on which movement is forbidden. Needs human verification of the exact painted symbols.

items.promptRawJa: Quels sont les candidats dont la demande de permis peut être refusée pour trois ans après avoir été pris sur le fait ?
items.promptGlossEn: Which candidates can have their license application refused for three years after being caught in the act?
items.reviewerNotes: Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Soft-locked qid q0446 was already selected for 018 screenshots/Screenshot 2026-05-08 at 21.45.13.png. Avoiding duplicate qid reuse; manual QC should decide whether this is duplicate coverage, a distinct new question, or a justified override.

items.promptRawJa: Que faut-il faire lorsque la circulation est lente et que d'autres véhicules s'insèrent dans le tronçon encombré ?
items.promptGlossEn: What should you do when traffic is slow and other vehicles are merging into the congested section?
optionsRawJa: A klaxonner et leur interdire de passer
B accélérer et suivre les véhicules précédents pour les empêcher de s'insérer
C laisser le passage poliment et assurer la distance sécuritaire
D forcer le véhicule qui souhaite s'insérer à partir
optionsGlossEn: A. Honk and prevent them from passing
B. Accelerate and follow the vehicles ahead to prevent them from merging
C. Politely let them merge and maintain a safe distance
D. Force the vehicle trying to merge to leave
items.reviewerNotes: Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Source asks about politely letting vehicles merge into congested traffic. Rejected q0970 because it asks about being overtaken and keeping horizontal distance; potential q0135 is hard-locked and concerns borrowing an opposite lane, not this merge scenario. Kept unresolved rather than forcing a broad traffic-courtesy match.

items.promptRawJa: Si un véhicule tombe en panne sur l'autoroute, le panneau danger doit être installé à 50 ou 100 m de ce véhicule sur la voie opposée.
items.promptGlossEn: If a vehicle breaks down on the motorway, the warning triangle must be placed 50 or 100 meters from the vehicle on the opposite lane.
items.reviewerNotes: Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Placement distance and direction for warning triangle on motorway has conflicting candidate guidance (behind vehicle, in-coming direction, opposite lane); source specifies 'opposite lane' creating mismatch — cannot safely map to existing qid.

items.promptRawJa: Il ne faut pas détourner le véhicule en sens inverse sur l'autoroute.
items.promptGlossEn: You must not turn the vehicle around in the opposite direction on the highway.
items.reviewerNotes: No exact master qid for general no U-turn/opposite-direction travel on a highway; q0010 is ramp-only and q0297 is a penalty-points statement.

items.promptRawJa: Lors de la circulation sur la voie de grêle, la stabilité du véhicule est réduite, c'est facile de glisser en cas de frein brutal.
items.promptGlossEn: When driving on a hail-covered road, vehicle stability is reduced, making it easy to skid if you brake sharply.
items.reviewerNotes: No exact master qid found for hail-covered road stability and sharp-braking skid risk; source answer is A/Yes.

items.promptRawJa: Combien d'heures d'affilée maximum peut-on conduire ?
items.promptGlossEn: What is the maximum number of consecutive hours one can drive?
items.reviewerNotes: Decision memory indicates consecutive-driving-hours items are not exact matches to q0445 rest-time wording. Source is valid MCQ; create new with local C (8 hours).

items.promptRawJa: Que peut-il se passer en cas de brouillard ?
items.promptGlossEn: What can happen in case of fog?
optionsRawJa: B glisser sur l'aile et provoquer un accident
C augmenter la densité de la circulation
optionsGlossEn: cause the engine to shut off
slide on the wing and cause an accident
items.reviewerNotes: Codex low-risk createNewQuestion: No close existing candidate; correct answer is clearly 'réduire la visibilité' (D) for fog. Recommend creating new question with D.

items.promptRawJa: Fumer en roulant ne peut pas avoir un impact sur la sécurité.
items.promptGlossEn: Smoking while driving cannot have an impact on safety.
items.reviewerNotes: Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: q0084 matches the assertion that smoking while driving has no impact — that assertion is false. Approve existing qid with answer No (B).

items.promptRawJa: Quelle est la vitesse maximale autorisée lors du franchissement d'un virage dangereux ?
items.promptGlossEn: What is the maximum speed allowed when passing through a dangerous curve?
items.reviewerNotes: Codex low-risk createNewQuestion: Valid MCQ asking maximum speed through a dangerous curve (explicitly 30 km/h, source option C). No existing candidate clearly matches this exact context (top candidate refers to railway crossing), so create new question and map answer to source C. Rejected top matcher: Top candidate q0382 concerns railway crossing (different context) despite sharing numeric answer; therefore not appropriate to approve.

items.promptRawJa: Si un minibus circule sur l'autoroute à moins de 100 km/h, quelle distance de sécurité doit-il respecter ?
items.promptGlossEn: If a minibus is driving on the highway at less than 100 km/h, what safety distance must it keep?
items.reviewerNotes: Codex medium-risk createNewQuestion: Specific numeric question about minibus safety distance (<100 km/h → at least 50 m). No existing candidate precisely covers 'minibus <100 km/h' distance; recommend creating new localized item. Source indicates option A (50 m).

items.promptRawJa: Quand s'allume, il faut verser de l'essence dans le moteur.
items.promptGlossEn: When this light comes on, you need to pour gasoline into the engine.
items.reviewerNotes: Codex medium-risk createNewQuestion: Image shows fuel‑pump/fuel indicator. Source asks if light means add gasoline — a valid ROW (Yes/No) item. No clear existing candidate for fuel indicator in top matches, so create new question; source 'Yes' = A.

items.promptRawJa: Afin d'éviter ta crevaison du pneu, quel acte est faut-adopter ?
items.promptGlossEn: To avoid a tire puncture, which action should be taken?
optionsRawJa: A Abaisser la pression de pneu
C Nettoyer les rayures de pneu
D Remplacer le pneu fendillé ou gave abumé
optionsGlossEn: D Replace the cracked or badly damaged tire
items.reviewerNotes: Codex low-risk createNewQuestion: Source asks which action to take to avoid a tire puncture; correct meaning is 'check your tires periodically' (French B). Top candidate q0125 is about the wrong measure (mismatch). No existing candidate clearly matches the positive phrasing, so create new. Rejected top matcher: Top candidate q0125 asks for the 'wrong' measure (opposite intent), not the positive action in the source.

items.promptRawJa: Les chasse-neige ou camions de maintien de la route en pleine activité sont prioritaires.
items.promptGlossEn: Are snow plows or road maintenance trucks in active operation given priority?
items.reviewerNotes: Codex medium-risk createNewQuestion: Statement 'Snow plows or road maintenance trucks in active operation are given priority' is a valid traffic-safety assertion but no close candidate qid in the shortlist matches this exact rule; recommend creating a new localized question. Answer is 'Yes' (A). Rejected top matcher: Top candidates are snow/icy-driving advice (q0022 etc.) but none explicitly state priority for active snowplows; therefore create new question.

items.promptRawJa: Que faut-il faire lors de la rencontre des élèves en groupe en circulant ?
items.promptGlossEn: What should you do when you encounter a group of students while driving?
optionsRawJa: A passer en accélérant à l'avance
B s'arrêter et céder le passage
C ralentir et passer à vitesse réduite
D klaxonner sons cesse pour les presser
optionsGlossEn: A pass by accelerating in advance
B stop and yield the right of way
C slow down and pass at reduced speed
D keep honking to hurry them
items.correctAnswerRaw: ralentir et passer à vitesse réduite
items.reviewerNotes: Codex medium-risk createNewQuestion: Safe-driving item about encountering a group of schoolchildren — correct behaviour 'ralentir et passer à vitesse réduite' matches source option C. No strong matching existing qid in shortlist; create new localized question.

items.promptRawJa: Le conducteur qui a heurté les monuments ou les installations publiques peut poursuivre sa route sans s'inquiéter.
items.promptGlossEn: A driver who hits monuments or public installations can continue driving without worrying.
items.reviewerNotes: Codex medium-risk createNewQuestion: No candidate in shortlist exactly addresses 'hitting monuments or public installations' obligation to stop/report; source correct answer is 'No' (B). Create new localized question as no clear existing qid matches. Rejected top matcher: Top candidates were not about responsibility after hitting public installations; none matched semantics closely enough to reuse.

items.promptRawJa: Quelle est la signification quand s'allume ?
items.promptGlossEn: What does it mean when this light comes on?
optionsRawJa: A l'éclairage proche des phares est en marche
B le feu d'antibrouillard avant est en marche
C le cote phare est en marche
D le feu d'antibrouillard arrière est en marche
optionsGlossEn: A the low beam headlights are on
B the front fog light is on
C the side headlight is on
D the rear fog light is on
items.correctAnswerRaw: l'éclairage proche des phares est en marche
items.reviewerNotes: Codex high-risk keepUnresolved: Embedded indicator image is blue (visual semantics suggest high-beam), but French options list low-beam/fog/side/rear fog only; no 'high beam' option — conflict between image semantics and available answers. Cannot resolve reliably.
